name_cn:
【Boulogne Handbag Vintage】m51265 Monogram
Part of the vintage Boulogne handbag series. Crafted from classic Monogram canvas, it features an adjustable shoulder strap for crossbody or shoulder wear, and a large capacity pocket to hold daily essentials. Unisex and timeless.
Dimensions: 19.0×30.0×10.0cm
